channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar - To Be Discontinued
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records with status To Be Discontinued from openFDA.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Desflurane Liquid for Inhalation (0781-6172-86)
item.description: Desflurane, Liquid for Inhalation, 240 mL/240 mL (NDC 0781-6172-86) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-07-02 Company: Jiangsu Hengrui Pharmaceuticals Co. (US Agent eVenus Pharmaceutical Laboratories, Inc.) Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug; Distributed by Sandoz, Inc.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Caspofungin Acetate Injection (0781-3421-94)
item.description: Caspofungin Acetate, Injection, 5 mg/1 mL (NDC 0781-3421-94) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-30 Company: Jiangsu Hengrui Pharmaceuticals Co. (US Agent eVenus Pharmaceutical Laboratories, Inc.) Marketed by Sandoz, Inc.; Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Caspofungin Acetate Injection (0781-3423-94)
item.description: Caspofungin Acetate, Injection, 7 mg/1 mL (NDC 0781-3423-94) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-30 Company: Jiangsu Hengrui Pharmaceuticals Co. (US Agent eVenus Pharmaceutical Laboratories, Inc.) Marketed by Sandoz, Inc.; Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Daptomycin Injection (0143-9378-01)
item.description: Daptomycin, Injection, 500 mg/10 mL (NDC 0143-9378-01) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-30 Company: Jiangsu Hengrui Pharmaceuticals Co. (US Agent eVenus Pharmaceutical Laboratories, Inc.) Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug; Marketed by Hikma Pharmaceuticals USA, Inc.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Daptomycin Injection (57884-3151-1)
item.description: Daptomycin, Injection, 500 mg/10 mL (NDC 57884-3151-1) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-30 Company: Jiangsu Hengrui Pharmaceuticals Co. (US Agent eVenus Pharmaceutical Laboratories, Inc.) Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Gadobutrol Injection (65219-281-02)
item.description: Gadobutrol, Injection, 604.72 mg/mL (NDC 65219-281-02) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-30 Company: Jiangsu Hengrui Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. Discontinuance of single dose vials, the other two Imaging Bulk Package(IBP) strengths are to remain in supply: the IBP strengths (18.1416 g/30 mL and 39.3068 g/65 mL); Marketed by Fresenius Kabi, USA

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Gadobutrol Injection (65219-281-07)
item.description: Gadobutrol, Injection, 604.72 mg/mL (NDC 65219-281-07) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-30 Company: Jiangsu Hengrui Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. item.title: To Be Discontinued: Emtricitabine Capsule (61958-0601-1)
item.description: Emtriva, Capsule, 200 mg (NDC 61958-0601-1) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-17 Company: Gilead Sciences, Inc. Product expected to be available until March 2027

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Emtricitabine Oral Solution (61958-0602-1)
item.description: Emtriva, Oral Solution, 10 mg/1 mL (NDC 61958-0602-1) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-17 Company: Gilead Sciences, Inc. Product expected to be available until March 2027

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Donepezil Hydrochloride; Memantine Hydrochloride Capsule, Extended Release (69238-1247-3)
item.description: Donepezil Hydrochloride; Memantine Hydrochloride, Capsule, Extended Release, 10 mg; 28 mg (NDC 69238-1247-3) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-15 Company: Amneal Pharmaceuticals Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Donepezil Hydrochloride; Memantine Hydrochloride Capsule, Extended Release (69238-1248-3)
item.description: Donepezil Hydrochloride; Memantine Hydrochloride, Capsule, Extended Release, 10 mg; 14 mg (NDC 69238-1248-3) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-15 Company: Amneal Pharmaceuticals Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Lorlatinib Tablet (0069-0227-03)
item.description: Lorbrena, Tablet, 25 mg; 120 tablets bottle with a child-resistant closure (NDC 0069-0227-03) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-15 Company: Pfizer Inc. Supply expected to exhaust 6/30/2026; NDC 0069-0227-01 25 mg; 30 tablets bottle with a child-resistant closure will continue to be manufactured; Discontinuation of the manufacture of this presentation

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Dacomitinib Tablet (0069-0197-30)
item.description: Vizimpro, Tablet, 15 mg (NDC 0069-0197-30) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-08 Company: Pfizer Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Vizimpro, Tablet, 30 mg (NDC 0069-1198-30) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-08 Company: Pfizer Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Dexmedetomidine Hydrochloride, Injection, 4 ug/1 mL (NDC 71225-126-05) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-05 Company: Slayback Pharma Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Dexmedetomidine Hydrochloride, Injection, 4 ug/1 mL (NDC 71225-126-06) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-05 Company: Slayback Pharma Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Semaglutide Tablet (0169-4303-30)
item.description: Rybelsus, Tablet, 3 mg (NDC 0169-4303-30) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-04 Company: Novo Nordisk, Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug. These products will be replaced by Ozempic (semaglutide) tablets.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Semaglutide Tablet (0169-4307-30)
item.description: Rybelsus, Tablet, 7 mg (NDC 0169-4307-30) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-04 Company: Novo Nordisk, Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug. These products will be replaced by Ozempic (semaglutide) tablets.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Semaglutide Tablet (0169-4314-30)
item.description: Rybelsus, Tablet, 14 mg (NDC 0169-4314-30) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-04 Company: Novo Nordisk, Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug. These products will be replaced by Ozempic (semaglutide) tablets.

item.description: Carboplatin, Injection, 50 mg/5 mL (10 mg/mL) Multiple Dose Vial (NDC 60505-6282-1) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-01 Company: Teyro Labs Wholesaler & Distributor through Marketing partner (Apotex Inc.); Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Dehydrated Alcohol Injection, Solution (16729-710-45)
item.description: Dehydrated Alcohol, Injection, Solution, 1 mL/1 mL (10 pack) (NDC 16729-710-45) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-27 Company: Accord Healthcare Inc. Accord is transitioning to the 5-pack configuration (NDC 16729-710-53).

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Alteplase Injection (50242-085-27)
item.description: Activase, Injection, 1 KIT in 1 CARTON (50242-085-27) * 100 mL in 1 VIAL, SINGLE-USE * 100 mL in 1 VIAL, SINGLE USE (NDC 50242-085-27) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-21 Company: Genentech, Inc Discontinuation of the 100mg vial configuration

item.description: Gadoterate Meglumine, Injection, 376.9 mg/1 mL (NDC 65219-086-20) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-21 Company: Jiangsu Hengrui Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Iron Sucrose Injection (67457-957-99)
item.description: Iron Sucrose, Injection, 50 mg/2.5 mL (NDC 67457-957-99) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-21 Company: Mylan Institutional, a Viatris Company A business decision has been made to discontinue of 2.5mL presentation only. Continuity of supply is forecasted across all other presentations of Iron Sucrose: 67457-639-10 Iron Sucrose 20mg/mL 10mL SDV 5PK 67457-638-10 Iron Sucrose 20mg/mL 5mL SDV 10PK 67457-638-25 Iron Sucrose 20mg/mL 5mL SDV 25PK.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Crinecerfont Capsule (70370-5025-1)
item.description: Crenessity, Capsule, 25 mg (NDC 70370-5025-1) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-28 Company: Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc. Neurocrine is discontinuing only the 25 mg soft gel capsule dose strength (NDC 70370-5025-01). The 50mg and 100mg soft gel capsule dose strength (NDC 70370-5050-1 and 70370-5100-1), and 50 mg/mL oral solution will continue to be marketed (NDC 70370-5250-1).

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Palbociclib Capsule (0069-0187-21)
item.description: Ibrance, Capsule, 75 mg (NDC 0069-0187-21) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-22 Company: Pfizer Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacturing of the capsule presentation. 75 mg Tablet NDC 0069-0284-03 will continue to be manufactured.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Palbociclib Capsule (0069-0188-21)
item.description: Ibrance, Capsule, 100 mg (NDC 0069-0188-21) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-22 Company: Pfizer Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacturing of the capsule presentation. 100 mg Tablet NDC 0069-0486-03 will continue to be manufactured.
